heading: Membership
label: 190103 Membership

children.heading: .—Eligibility
children.label: a .—Eligibility
children.text: Eligibility for membership in the corporation is as provided in the constitution and bylaws of the corporation.

children.heading: .—Voting
children.label: b .—Voting
children.text: Each active member of a department or chapter has one vote in the conduct of official business of that department or chapter.
